sections.heading: Management of Surgically Resectable Thymoma
sections.content: [{"pathway_id": "thymoma_resectable", "title": "Management of Surgically Resectable Thymoma", "branching_basis": ["Masaoka-Koga stage", "Capsular invasion status", "Completeness of resection (R0/R1/R2)"], "nodes": [{"criteria": "Thymoma, clinically resectable, Masaoka-Koga stage I (no capsular invasion).", "options": [{"type": "surgery", "label": "Surgical resection (total thymectomy and complete tumor excision)", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "Primary treatment. Avoid surgical biopsy if thymoma is strongly suspected [a]. Avoid transpleural biopsy approach [a].", "linked_regimen_ids": []}, {"type": "observation", "label": "Observation", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "For patients with completely resected (R0) stage I thymoma and no capsular invasion, no adjuvant therapy is recommended due to low recurrence risk and absence of survival benefit [22,91,93-96].", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": true, "summary": "No adjuvant RT or chemotherapy recommended for R0 resection, Masaoka-Koga stage I."}}, {"criteria": "Thymoma, surgically resectable. Masaoka-Koga stage II–IV with capsular invasion, OR R0 resection with high-risk features, OR R1 (microscopic residual) resection.", "options": [{"type": "surgery", "label": "Surgical resection", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "Primary treatment with goal of R0 resection [THYM-2].", "linked_regimen_ids": []}, {"type": "radiation_therapy", "label": "Adjuvant postoperative RT", "preference": "Recommended", "recommendation": "Should be considered after R0 resection if capsular invasion present or for stage II–IV. Recommended for R1 resection. Dose: 45–50 Gy for clear/close margins; 54 Gy for microscopically positive margins [i]. Decisions about adjuvant RT should be based on MDT evaluation [j].", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": true, "summary": "Adjuvant RT is recommended for stage II–IV disease after R0 resection, or for any R1 resection, regardless of stage."}}, {"criteria": "Thymoma, surgically resectable, but R0 resection deemed uncertain.", "options": [{"type": "systemic_therapy", "label": "Neoadjuvant systemic therapy", "preference": "Recommended", "recommendation": "Preoperative systemic therapy should be considered to improve resectability and increase odds of R0 resection [f,61-64]. Followed by reassessment for surgery.", "linked_regimen_ids": ["thymoma_first_line_cap"]}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": false, "summary": ""}}, {"criteria": "Thymoma, R2 resection (macroscopic residual tumor).", "options": [{"type": "radiation_therapy", "label": "Definitive RT ± chemotherapy", "preference": "Recommended", "recommendation": "Total dose of 60–66 Gy (1.8–2.0 Gy/fraction) is recommended for gross residual disease [3-6].", "linked_regimen_ids": []}, {"type": "systemic_therapy", "label": "Systemic therapy ± RT", "preference": "Recommended", "recommendation": "Postoperative chemotherapy in combination with RT is an option [k,l]. There is diversity of opinion on optimal approach [l].", "linked_regimen_ids": ["thymoma_first_line_cap", "thymoma_first_line_carbo_taxol"]}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": true, "summary": "For R2 resection, definitive RT (with or without chemotherapy) or systemic therapy combined with RT is recommended."}}]}]

sections.heading: Management of Advanced, Metastatic, or Recurrent Thymoma
sections.content: [{"pathway_id": "thymoma_advanced_metastatic", "title": "Management of Advanced, Metastatic, or Recurrent Thymoma", "branching_basis": ["Resectability of primary and metastatic sites", "Disease dissemination (localized vs. extrathoracic)", "Patient fitness"], "nodes": [{"criteria": "Thymoma. Locally advanced, solitary, or ipsilateral pleural metastasis. Potentially resectable disease (primary and isolated metastases deemed resectable).", "options": [{"type": "systemic_therapy", "label": "Neoadjuvant systemic therapy", "preference": "Consider", "recommendation": "To reduce tumor size and increase odds of complete resection [61-64,150].", "linked_regimen_ids": ["thymoma_first_line_cap"]}, {"type": "surgery", "label": "Surgical resection of primary tumor and isolated metastases", "preference": "Recommended if resectable", "recommendation": "Goal is complete resection of all disease [g].", "linked_regimen_ids": []}, {"type": "radiation_therapy", "label": "Postoperative RT", "preference": "Consider", "recommendation": "Consider postoperative RT after resection of primary and metastases [i].", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": true, "summary": "Aim for R0 resection with possible neoadjuvant therapy. Adjuvant RT may be considered postoperatively."}}, {"criteria": "Thymoma. Locally advanced disease, deemed unresectable.", "options": [{"type": "radiation_therapy", "label": "Definitive RT", "preference": "Option", "recommendation": "Dose 60–66 Gy for unresectable disease [3].", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": false, "summary": ""}}]}]

Stage II–IV or R0 high-risk or R1

edges.label: Masaoka-Koga stage I, no capsular invasion
Stage II–IV with capsular invasion, OR R0 high-risk, OR R1
Adjuvant RT indicated (capsular invasion, stage II–IV, or R1)

nodes.label: Locally advanced, solitary or ipsilateral pleural metastasis, potentially resectable
